'''Dark Mara''' was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-manifested doppelgänger that appeared to [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

==Biography==
After landing on the remote planet [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] began [[Mission to Dromund Kaas (New Republic)|searching]] for missing [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kyle Katarn]]. Nearing the ruins of a [[Dark Force Temple|Sith Temple]], she was attacked by a strange apparition—what appeared to be herself, immersed in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], wearing black clothing, and wielding a red [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. After a difficult battle, Jade emerged victorious. Upon the spirit's defeat, a path leading further into the temple was revealed.

==Powers and abilities==
A formidable opponent, Dark Mara was known to possess skill with a lightsaber as well as prowess in the Force, as shown by her manipulation of [[Force lightning/Legends#Chain lightning|chain lightning]]. Interestingly, she was also able to use the traditionally [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] power [[Force blinding]].

==Behind the scenes==
Although never mentioned by name in-game, "Dark Mara" is an enemy and multiplayer character in [[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith|''Mysteries of the Sith'']]. This article's title is derived from the multiplayer character.

The duel was intended to be similar to Luke Skywalker's duel with the [[Dark Spirit]] on Dagobah.<ref name="BTS blog">{{Blog|RyanKaufman|4|Kyle and Mara: Making Mysteries of the Sith - Part II: Zombies of the Dark Side}}"</ref>

Although Dark Mara never speaks in-game, when wounded she emits a cry identical to those of Mara Jade (voiced by [[Heidi Shannon]]).

Dark Mara also appears in the hidden level of Mysteries of the Sith, where she fights [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' {{1st}}
